Class EspacioService

Namespace
BLL.Services
Assembly
BLL.dll

Business logic service for sports space (espacio) management.

public class EspacioService
Inheritance
object
EspacioService
Inherited Members
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Deletion is soft when the space has future non-cancelled/non-finalized reservations: the space is set to Inactivo instead of being physically removed.

Constructors

EspacioService()

Initializes dependencies from DalFactory singletons.

public EspacioService()

Methods

ActualizarEspacio(EspacioDTO)

Updates an existing sports space.

public void ActualizarEspacio(EspacioDTO dto)

Parameters

dto EspacioDTO

Updated space data. Id must identify an existing record.

Exceptions

ArgumentException

Thrown for negative price or empty name.

CrearEspacio(EspacioDTO)

Creates a new sports space.

public void CrearEspacio(EspacioDTO dto)

Parameters

dto EspacioDTO

Space data. Name must be non-empty and price non-negative.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown when dto is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown for negative price or empty name.

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if dto is null.

ArgumentException

Thrown if price is negative or name is empty.

EliminarEspacio(Guid)

Deletes or soft-deletes a space. If the space has future active reservations it is marked Inactivo; otherwise it is physically removed.

public void EliminarEspacio(Guid id)

Parameters

id Guid

The space to remove.

ListarEspacios()

Returns only active spaces (suitable for reservation booking).

public List<EspacioDTO> ListarEspacios()

Returns

List<EspacioDTO>

ListarTodos()

Returns all spaces regardless of status (for administrative views).

public List<EspacioDTO> ListarTodos()

Returns

List<EspacioDTO>
